message: Rain is expected in your area today. Avoid irrigation.
Soil moisture is low, but rain is expected today. Wait for rainfall before irrigating your plot.
Soil moisture is low, but rain is likely today. Wait for rainfall before irrigating your plot.
Soil moisture is low. Rain may occur today, monitor weather before irrigating.
Soil moisture is low in your plot. Irrigation is recommended today.
Soil temperature is high, but rain is expected today which may cool the soil. Monitor soil conditions.
Soil temperature is high, but rain is likely today which may cool the soil. Monitor soil moisture.
Soil temperature is high and rain may occur today. Monitor soil moisture.
Soil temperature is high in your plot. Monitor soil moisture and irrigate if required.
Soil temperature is low and rain is expected today. Monitor crop growth and soil conditions.
Soil temperature is low and rain is likely today. Monitor crop growth and soil conditions.
Soil temperature is low and rain may occur today. Monitor crop growth and soil conditions.
Soil temperature is lower than optimal levels. Monitor crop growth and soil conditions.
High wind conditions expected today. Avoid pesticide spraying to prevent drift.
